DARV.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARA: You big worm also want to climb to the top of the tower? Don't rush off, take something!
<The Insatiable Sandworm picks through gems shimmering with colorful light>
You like shiny things, don't you? I happen to have a nice collection here!
You're going to find the Architect, aren't you! Then go devour him!! That way we can trade even better!
NEOW.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARA: <The Insatiable Sandworm makes a resentful sound>
NONUPEIPE.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_: Guest from the hive, even one as savage as you has beautiful fur. Come, I shall grant you a blessing.
Decoration is impractical for hunting, but it can help you intimidate enemies. Take this gift.
<The Insatiable Sandworm shakes off golden sand>
It seems you have learned etiquette, which is good. But keep some savagery, in order to... kill the Architect.
OROBAS.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHA: A sandworm?! Such a big mouth! So scary! Don't eat me!!
Not eating me?! I'm not tasty? Want to eat the Architect!? Why?!
You're in sand! I'm in water!! Same!? Not same!?
Sand is pretty? Glass is too!! Look more! Look together!!
PAEL.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARA: [thinky_dots]Insatiable Sandworm? Why have you left your hive? Are you hungry again...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Don't burrow up from the ground anymore, you disturb my sleep...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Can yellow sand fill your belly? If so, my flesh and blood must be the same. Take it...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARA: [b]Insatiable Sandworm! Are your appendages still sharp!?[/b]
[b]King of the hive! How do you use weapons!?[/b]
<The Insatiable Sandworm opens its massive jaws>
TEZCATARA.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_: Ah, today's visitor is a [jitter][b]sandworm[/b][/jitter]! Have something to eat!
Are you hungry? There happen to be freshly baked cookies here.
<The Insatiable Sandworm stares intently at Tezcatara's staff>
Oh my, you like this? A [jitter][b]fire-proof[/b][/jitter] little worm is the first I've seen.
VAKUU.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHAR: A lowly insect wants to trade? Very well, my appetite is [sine]insatiable[/sine] just like yours.
Sign the contract here, hmm, with those claws of yours—
<The Insatiable Sandworm swallows the parchment whole>
Have you tasted the flavor of [sine]souls[/sine]?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.THEINSATIABLE-INSATIA: Why has the hive's sandworm come to the top of the tower?
<The Insatiable Sandworm charges before the Architect>
You insect, don't you know to seek advantage and avoid harm?
<The Insatiable Sandworm emerges from the yellow sand>
